## Checklist
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) and is signed (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Lint, type-check, and tests pass locally
- [ ] I added/updated tests for my changes
- [ ] I updated docs (incl. relevant `docs/` spec) where needed
- [ ] No secrets/PII committed; inputs validated; tenant-scoping respected
